creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
crees       2011-07-27 15:15:25 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    irc                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    irc/inspircd12       Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    irc/inspircd12/files inspircd.sh.in 
                         patch-src__modules__m_nationalchars.cpp 
  Log:
  Import version 1.2 of inspircd -- 'there's no m_codepage for 2.x yet'.
  
  InspIRCd is a highly modular C++ IRC daemon. It supports most features
  of other IRC daemons, and supports FreeBSD kqueue() for connection
  management.
  
  WWW: http://www.inspircd.org/
  
  PR:             ports/155344
  Submitted by:   Maxim Ignatenko <gelraen.ua at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.214     +1 -0      ports/irc/Makefile
  1.1       +213 -0    ports/irc/inspircd12/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/irc/inspircd12/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +76 -0     ports/irc/inspircd12/files/inspircd.sh.in (new)
  1.1       +14 -0     ports/irc/inspircd12/files/patch-src__modules__m_nationalchars.cpp (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/irc/inspircd12/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +415 -0    ports/irc/inspircd12/pkg-plist (new)
